usagePolicy.prompt: Use brave-search for web and local searches to gather information or answer user queries. Prioritize for factual data or recent information. Use domain filters to refine results when applicable.
usagePolicy.constraints: Secure API key. Use sparingly for non-critical queries to manage API usage.

brave-search.recommendation: Added to enhance search capabilities with a focus on privacy-preserving search results. Complements fetch by offering structured search data.
